sentences.text: Hans felt sad because the basket was big, and he knew he would have no flowers left for the market.
The Miller said he gave Hans his wheelbarrow, so asking for a few flowers was not much.
He thought true friendship should be free from any selfishness.
Hans called the Miller his dear friend and said he could have all the flowers.
